meta.name: Creator Studio Design System
meta.description: Comprehensive design system for the Creator Studio analytics dashboard. All tokens map directly to custom Tailwind v3 classes defined in tailwind.config.js. Use this file as the single source of truth when building new features, pages, or components.

core_principles: All cards use white backgrounds with 24px border radius and shadow-card. Never use borders on cards.
Use elevation (shadows) to create depth instead of borders or background color changes.
Keep the app background as the linear gradient — never override it with a solid color.
Typography must follow the defined scale strictly. Do not use arbitrary font sizes except for sub-caption labels (9px–11px) when necessary.
Color usage must be purposeful: use accent colors to encode meaning (status, category, progress), not decoration.
All interactive elements must use transition-all duration-[180ms] ease-out. Never use other durations.
Pill shape (rounded-pill) is the default for all buttons, tags, badges, inputs, and nav elements.
Prefer Tailwind utility classes. Only use inline styles for dynamic values computed from data (e.g. chart colors, progress widths).
Icon size is always 14px–18px, stroke width 1.5px. Use Lucide React exclusively.
Maintain 12-column grid at the page level with 24px (gap-6) gutters. Section rows use col-span-8 + col-span-4 split.
Never use drop shadows stronger than shadow-hover. The design is intentionally light and airy.
Glassmorphism (bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-sm) is reserved for navbar elements floating over the gradient background only.
do_not: Do not add borders to cards (design uses shadow for elevation, not borders).
Do not use color-scheme: dark or add dark mode styles — this is a light-only UI.
Do not use font families other than Inter / SF Pro Display / Helvetica Neue.
Do not use Tailwind's default rounded-lg (which is 8px) — use the custom scale: rounded-xs through rounded-pill.
Do not use transition durations other than 180ms.
Do not place content wider than max-w-[1440px].
Do not use saturated or high-contrast colors outside the defined palette.
Do not add animations beyond hover lifts (hover:-translate-y-0.5) and animate-pulse for live indicators.
Do not use box shadows with rgba values stronger than rgba(0,0,0,0.08).

colors.description: All color tokens are defined in tailwind.config.js and available as Tailwind utility classes.

app_gradient.usage: Applied as inline style on the root app div. Never replicate with Tailwind gradient classes.

surface_soft.usage: Hover states on list rows, input backgrounds, secondary icon backgrounds

soft.usage: Button backgrounds, icon container backgrounds, tag backgrounds for primary-themed items

mint.usage: Light background version of green, icon containers

primary.usage: Primary headings, strong labels, active states, button backgrounds

inverse.usage: Text on dark (ink) or primary-colored backgrounds

soft.usage: Dividers and hairlines when needed. Avoid on cards.

success.usage: Positive engagement, upward trends, live indicators

opacity_utilities.description: Used for glassmorphism and translucent surfaces only
examples: bg-white/70 — search bar and icon button backgrounds

font_family.stack: Inter, SF Pro Display, Helvetica Neue, sans-serif
font_family.note: Applied globally via body in index.css. Do not override per-component.

display.usage: Large metric values in KPI cards

body.usage: General UI text, table cells, nav tabs, input text

caption.usage: Labels, subtitles, badges, timestamps, legend items

sub_caption.usage: Video duration overlays, tag chips, fine-print metadata only. Use sparingly.

spacing.description: Follow Tailwind's 4px base scale. Prefer multiples of 8px for most spacing. Use the values below as a reference for established patterns.

common_patterns.badge_padding: px-2 py-1 (caption badges) / px-3 py-1.5 (action badges)

border_radius.description: Custom scale defined in tailwind.config.js. Always use these — do not use Tailwind's built-in rounded scale.

lg.usage: Icon containers within cards (w-10 h-10), thumbnail images

xl.usage: All cards, all panels — this is the primary card radius

pill.usage: Buttons, badges, nav tabs, inputs, avatars, progress bars, legend lines, notification dots

card.usage: Default shadow on all cards and panels

hover.usage: Elevated state on hover, tooltip backgrounds

soft.usage: Navbar elements, icon buttons, search bar, active nav tabs

standard.usage: All interactive elements — cards, buttons, tabs, rows

opacity_only.usage: Show/hide overlays on hover (e.g. play button over thumbnails)

transitions.note: Always use 180ms. Do not use Tailwind's preset durations (duration-150, duration-200, etc.).

lift.usage: Cards on hover, always paired with hover:shadow-hover

card.description: The foundational layout block. All dashboard panels are cards.
card.hover_variant: bg-surface-card rounded-xl p-5 shadow-card hover:shadow-hover transition-all duration-[180ms] ease-out hover:-translate-y-0.5
rules: Never add a border to a card.
Use p-5 (20px) for internal padding consistently.
Cards that contain lists or charts should declare h-full when inside a grid row to equalize height.

card_header_pattern.description: Standard card header with title, subtitle, and optional action
card_header_pattern.structure:
{Title}

{Subtitle}

{OptionalAction}

navbar.description: Top navigation bar. Floats over the gradient background using glassmorphism.
navbar.container: max-w-[1440px] mx-auto px-8 h-16 flex items-center justify-between gap-6

logo.icon_box: w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-ink flex items-center justify-center
logo.icon: Zap from lucide-react, size=16, text-accent-yellow fill='#FFD76A'
logo.label: text-body-lg font-bold text-ink tracking-tight

nav_tabs.wrapper: flex items-center gap-1 bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-pill px-2 py-1.5 shadow-soft
nav_tabs.active_tab: px-4 py-1.5 rounded-pill text-body font-medium bg-ink text-white shadow-soft transition-all duration-[180ms] ease-out
nav_tabs.inactive_tab: px-4 py-1.5 rounded-pill text-body font-medium text-ink-secondary hover:text-ink hover:bg-surface-soft transition-all duration-[180ms] ease-out

search.wrapper: flex items-center gap-2 bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-pill px-4 py-2 shadow-soft
search.input: bg-transparent text-body text-ink placeholder:text-ink-muted outline-none w-36

icon_button.classes: relative w-9 h-9 rounded-pill bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-sm shadow-soft flex items-center justify-center text-ink-secondary hover:text-ink transition-all duration-[180ms] border-0 cursor-pointer
icon_button.notification_dot: absolute top-1.5 right-1.5 w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-status-danger

navbar.avatar: w-9 h-9 rounded-pill bg-gradient-to-br from-primary to-accent-purple flex items-center justify-center text-white text-caption font-semibold shadow-soft cursor-pointer

metric_card.description: KPI summary card. Used in a 4-column grid at the top of the dashboard.
metric_card.card_classes: bg-surface-card rounded-xl p-5 shadow-card hover:shadow-hover transition-all duration-[180ms] ease-out hover:-translate-y-0.5
metric_card.icon_container: w-10 h-10 rounded-lg {iconBg} flex items-center justify-center

trend_badge.positive: flex items-center gap-0.5 text-caption font-semibold rounded-pill px-2 py-1 bg-status-success/10 text-status-success
trend_badge.negative: flex items-center gap-0.5 text-caption font-semibold rounded-pill px-2 py-1 bg-status-danger/10 text-status-danger

progress_bar.fill: h-full rounded-pill — use inline style for dynamic background color and opacity: 0.7

primary.classes: bg-ink text-white rounded-pill px-5 py-2.5 text-body font-medium border-0 cursor-pointer transition-all duration-[180ms] ease-out hover:opacity-90

secondary.classes: bg-surface-soft text-ink rounded-pill px-4 py-2 text-body font-medium border-0 cursor-pointer transition-all duration-[180ms] ease-out hover:bg-border-soft

accent.classes: text-caption font-medium text-primary bg-primary-soft rounded-pill px-3 py-1.5 border-0 cursor-pointer hover:bg-primary hover:text-white transition-all duration-[180ms]

icon_button.classes: w-9 h-9 rounded-pill bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-sm shadow-soft flex items-center justify-center text-ink-secondary hover:text-ink transition-all duration-[180ms] border-0 cursor-pointer

badge_and_tag.description: Pill-shaped labels for categories, statuses, and counts.
badge_and_tag.status_positive: text-caption font-semibold rounded-pill px-2 py-1 bg-status-success/10 text-status-success
badge_and_tag.status_negative: text-caption font-semibold rounded-pill px-2 py-1 bg-status-danger/10 text-status-danger
badge_and_tag.neutral_tag: text-caption text-ink-muted bg-surface-soft rounded-pill px-2.5 py-1 font-medium

progress_bar.fill: h-full rounded-pill — width via inline style, background via inline style
progress_bar.legend_variant: w-20 h-1.5 bg-surface-soft rounded-pill overflow-hidden — used in AudienceChart legend

list_row.description: Hoverable row pattern used in tables and feeds.
list_row.classes: flex items-center gap-3 px-2 py-2.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-surface-soft transition-all duration-[180ms] cursor-pointer
list_row.activity_variant: flex items-start gap-3 p-2.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-surface-soft transition-all duration-[180ms] cursor-pointer
list_row.table_row: grid grid-cols-[2fr_1fr_1fr_1fr] gap-4 items-center px-2 py-2.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-surface-soft transition-all duration-[180ms] cursor-pointer group

icon_container.description: Colored background circle/square for icons in cards and activity feeds.
icon_container.small: w-8 h-8 rounded-lg {bg} flex items-center justify-center shrink-0
icon_container.medium: w-10 h-10 rounded-lg {bg} flex items-center justify-center
icon_container.icon_size: 14px for small containers, 18px for medium containers
icon_container.note: Use rounded-lg (20px), not rounded-xl, for icon containers inside cards.

chart_tooltip.classes: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-hover px-4 py-3 text-body
chart_tooltip.title: font-semibold text-ink mb-1
chart_tooltip.value: font-medium — use appropriate accent or primary color
chart_tooltip.subtitle: text-ink-muted text-caption

center_label.classes: absolute inset-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-center pointer-events-none
center_label.label: text-caption text-ink-muted

live_indicator.description: Animated dot indicating real-time data. Used in ActivityFeed.
live_indicator.dot_classes: inline-block w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-status-success ml-1.5 align-middle animate-pulse
live_indicator.wrapper: text-caption text-ink-muted bg-surface-soft rounded-pill px-2.5 py-1 font-medium

video_thumbnail.description: Emoji-based placeholder thumbnail for video rows.
video_thumbnail.container: w-14 h-9 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-lg shrink-0 relative overflow-hidden group
video_thumbnail.background: inline style: { background: accentColor + '33' } — 20% opacity tinted background
video_thumbnail.hover_overlay: absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-[180ms] bg-black/20 rounded-lg
video_thumbnail.play_icon: Play from lucide-react, size=12, text-white, fill='white'
video_thumbnail.duration_badge: absolute bottom-0.5 right-0.5 text-[9px] font-medium text-white bg-black/50 rounded px-0.5 leading-none py-0.5

page.background: min-h-screen font-sans — with inline gradient style on root div

standard_split.description: Default two-column layout for dashboard rows

iconography.note: Pass size as a prop number (not string). Do not override stroke-width via className.

glassmorphism.description: Used exclusively for navbar elements that float over the gradient background.
rules: Never use glassmorphism inside a card — card backgrounds are always solid white.
Always pair with shadow-soft when using glassmorphism.
backdrop-blur-sm is the only blur level used — do not increase it.

data_visualization.note: Use accent colors in order for chart segments, bars, and series. The last color (#F0F2F5) is for 'Other' or neutral segments.
data_visualization.tooltip: Always use custom tooltip components styled as chart_tooltip component above.
data_visualization.axes: Always hide axis lines and tick lines. Use #9CA3AF for tick text. Use Inter font in charts.
data_visualization.grid_lines: Only horizontal grid lines (vertical: false). Use strokeDasharray='3 3' and stroke='#F0F2F5'.

conventions: One component per file, named with PascalCase matching the filename.
Data arrays live in the same file as the component (no separate data files for now).
No prop-types or TypeScript — keep it plain JSX.
Import icons directly from lucide-react (named imports only).
Import chart primitives directly from recharts (named imports only).
